entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT DEPLETION
entities.description: The reduction of essential nutrients in the soil, which acts as a major constraint to sustainable agricultural development

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The long-term maintenance of agricultural productivity and environmental health

entities.name: CEREAL
entities.description: Grains used in cropping systems in southern Mali

entities.name: SOUTHERN MALI
entities.description: The geographic region in Mali where the study on soil fertility management is conducted

entities.name: KOUTIALA DISTRICT
entities.description: A specific administrative area in southern Mali used for monitoring nutrient flow

entities.name: NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing soil nutrients to prevent depletion

entities.name: REGENERATION AND PLANT PROTECTION
entities.description: Methods used to restore soil health and protect crops

entities.name: LIVESTOCK INTEGRATION
entities.description: The practice of incorporating livestock into farming systems to improve nutrient cycling

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Techniques used to protect soil from erosion and manage water resources

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of biological species within the agricultural ecosystem

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL POLICIES
entities.description: Government regulations and strategies that influence farming practices

entities.name: MARKETING STRUCTURES
entities.description: The economic systems and channels used for the sale of agricultural products

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The economic state of farm households that limits their ability to invest in agricultural technologies

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in climate patterns that worsen soil nutrient depletion

entities.name: CLIMATE SMART TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Agricultural practices designed to increase productivity and resilience to climate change

entities.name: ORGANIC MANURE
entities.description: A climate-smart technology involving the application of decomposed organic matter to the soil

entities.name: MICRO DOSING
entities.description: A climate-smart technology involving the application of small, precise amounts of fertilizer

entities.name: FARM CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: A method used to describe farm attributes to understand soil fertility management strategies

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of the soil to provide essential nutrients for plant growth

entities.name: NUTRIENT FLOW
entities.description: The movement and cycling of nutrients within a farm-scale system
